inputs.label: Sector
inputs.businessContext: CBAM sectors as defined in EU Regulation 2023/956. Select the sector of the product.

inputs.label: Annual Production Volume
inputs.businessContext: Total annual production volume of the product in tonnes. Required for calculating embedded emissions.

inputs.label: Embedded Emissions per Tonne
inputs.businessContext: Direct and indirect greenhouse gas emissions embedded in one tonne of product, measured in tonnes of CO2 equivalent. Based on ISO 14064 and GHG Protocol.

inputs.label: Carbon Price in Origin Country
inputs.businessContext: Current carbon price applicable in the country of origin. If no carbon price, enter 0. Based on World Bank Carbon Pricing Dashboard.

inputs.label: CBAM Certificate Price (EU ETS)
inputs.businessContext: Current price of CBAM certificates, linked to EU ETS allowance price. Source: European Energy Exchange (EEX).

inputs.label: Free Allowance Factor
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of emissions covered by free allowances during the transitional period. Default 0% for full exposure. Based on CBAM regulation.

inputs.label: Data Confidence Level
inputs.businessContext: Confidence level in the input data. Low: estimated, Medium: industry average, High: verified. Affects confidence adjustment.

thresholds.embeddedEmissionsPerTon: if embeddedEmissionsPerTon > sectorBenchmark then 'High emissions relative to sector benchmark'
thresholds.carbonPriceOrigin: if carbonPriceOrigin < 10 then 'Low carbon price in origin country, high exposure'
thresholds.freeAllowanceFactor: if freeAllowanceFactor < 20 then 'Limited free allowances, full exposure'

hiddenLossDrivers: High embedded emissions relative to sector benchmark
Low carbon price in origin country
suggestedActions: Reduce embedded emissions through process optimization (Lean, ISO 50001)
Monitor carbon price trends in origin country
Apply for free allowances if eligible
Consider sourcing from countries with higher carbon prices
